name: update_story
description: Update an existing story's content, name, slug, tags, or other metadata. You must provide the full content object (not just the changed fields) as Storyblok replaces the entire content on update. The updated story becomes a draft until explicitly published. This endpoint requires a Management API token.

parameters.name: space_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the Storyblok space.

parameters.name: story_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the story to update. Obtain from list_stories or get_story.

parameters.name: story
parameters.description: The story object with updated fields. Must include the full 'content' object (partial updates to content are not supported). Can also include 'name', 'slug', 'tag_list', 'parent_id', 'is_startpage'.

parameters.name: publish
parameters.description: Set to 1 to publish the story immediately after the update. Defaults to 0 (saves as draft).

body.text: This content has been updated with new information.
This content has been updated with new information.
